summary: Fixed cross-project wrong/empty-terminal bug via option (b): added nullable launchProject column to supervised_session (DDL + idempotent migration), addSupervised stores targetProject (null when ==tracking), new getSupervisedLaunchProject getter; coordinator-live.ts:347 now records targetProject; both create-terminal sites (ide-routes.ts + api.ts /api/terminal/sessions) resolve launchProject and derive tmuxBaseName + heal + cwd from it so they hit the SAME tmux the worker launched under. Same-project case unchanged (launchProject null). Added supervisor-store.launch-project.test.ts asserting create-terminal-derived name == spawn-side name for targetProject!=project. Gate: 31/31 bun tests pass, tsc clean for change-set.
